name: HermitStash
description: Post-quantum encrypted self-hosted file sharing with ML-KEM-1024 and XChaCha20-Poly1305.
longDescription:
HermitStash is a self-hosted file upload server with post-quantum encryption. Files are sealed with ML-KEM-1024, XChaCha20-Poly1305, and Argon2id before touching disk.

Features include shareable download links with expiry and download limits, WebAuthn passkey authentication, S3-compatible storage backends, and an admin panel for managing users, uploads, and server settings. The TLS layer negotiates X25519MLKEM768 for quantum-resistant key exchange on supported browsers.
